channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Iowa's top leaders are strongly endorsing Musk and DOGE. Iowans are watching closely
item.description: URBANDALE, Iowa (AP) — Iowa Sen. Joni Ernst has hailed Elon Musk and the Trump administration's Department of Government Efficiency as a necessary force in Washington, D.C., calling it “a storm that is headed this way that will sweep over this city and forever alter the way it operates.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US seizes second plane owned by Venezuelan government in Dominican Republic, citing evasion of sanctions
item.description: An aircraft that U.S. officials say was used to benefit Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro was seized Thursday in the Dominican Republic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DeSantis backs Trump’s plans for FEMA, DOGE efforts
item.description: The governor announced his support for President Donald Trump looking to remove FEMA as a middleman after a disaster.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Russell Vought confirmed to head government's leading budget office after Dems hold 30-hour protest
item.description: Despite Democratic tactics to delay the vote, the Senate confirmed Russell Vought to lead the Office of Management and Budget (OMB). He previously served as OMB director during President Donald Trump's first administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Dem stall tactics slow cabinet confirmations
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump administration, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DOGE was tasked with stopping Treasury payments to USAID, AP sources say
item.description: Officials working with Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency sought access to the U.S. Department of Treasury payment system to stop money from flowing to the U.S. Agency for International Development, according to two people familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: How Trump's federal worker buyout plan could impact San Diego
item.description: As the deadline looms for workers to accept the Trump administration's sweeping separation offer, the more than two million civilian employees by the federal government across the country are weighing whether to take it.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Dems who lashed out at Trump for being 'threat to democracy' flip script with last-minute delay tactics
item.description: Voters overwhelmingly elected President Donald Trump to carry out his agenda despite Democrats calling him a "threat to democracy." Dems are now delaying key cabinet appointments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Rubio’s trip abroad was overshadowed by foreign policy at home, from USAID to Trump's Gaza plan
item.description: SANTO DOMINGO, Dominican Republic (AP) — U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio may have hoped to spend his first trip abroad focused exclusively on issues close to his heart: immigration, counternarcotics and curbing Chinese influence in the Western Hemisphere.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrats delay Kash Patel committee vote
item.description: Voting on Patel's nomination was on the agenda for Judiciary members, but Democrats requested it be held over one week.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Trump doubles down on Gaza Strip idea, says no US soldiers needed
item.description: President Trump on Thursday doubled down on his proposal for the U.S. to take control of the Gaza Strip and rebuild it.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump meets with congressional Republicans as GOP lawmakers argue over tax and spending cuts
item.description: President Donald Trump hosted an unusually long meeting with House Republicans at the White House on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro, Kevin Freking And Darlene Superville, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Latest: Judge temporarily blocks Trump plan offering incentives for federal workers to resign
item.description: A federal judge has blocked President Donald Trump’s plan to push out federal employees by offering them financial incentives.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Israel defense minister tells army to prepare to relocate Palestinians from Gaza
item.description: He says the military should prepare exit options by land, sea and air so that anyone who wishes to can leave for "any country willing to accept them.
item.dc:creator: Jerome Socolovsky and Ryland Barton, MPR News

item.title: Rattled by politics? Try some sweet potato pie
item.description: Rose McGee, the founder of the Twin Cities nonprofit Sweet Potato Comfort Pie, hopes her comfort food will help people connect and have meaningful conversations around hard topics like race.
item.dc:creator: Annie Baxter, MPR News

item.title: Justice Department appeals as second judge in 2 days blocks Trump's birthright citizenship order
item.description: A second federal judge in two days has blocked President Donald Trump’s executive order ending birthright citizenship for the children of parents who are in the U.S. illegally.
item.dc:creator: Gene Johnson And Mike Catalini, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Guatemala gives Rubio a second deportation deal for migrants being sent home from the US
item.description: GUATEMALA CITY (AP) — Guatemalan President Bernardo Arévalo said Wednesday his country will accept migrants from other countries who are being deported from the United States, the second deportation deal that Secretary of State Marco Rubio has reached during a Central America trip that has been focu
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Gaza rehab and other global policy ideas, Trump goes from America First to America Everywhere
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump promised voters an administration that wouldn’t waste precious American lives and taxpayer treasure on far-off wars and nation building.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New attorney general moves to align Justice Department with Trump's priorities
item.description: Trump and Attorney General Pam Bondi have both argued the Justice Department under Biden unfairly targeted conservatives, most notably Trump himself.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Musk says DOGE will make 'rapid safety upgrades' to air traffic control system
item.description: "With the support of President @realDonaldTrump, the @DOGE team will aim to make rapid safety upgrades to the air traffic control system," Musk wrote Wednesday on the social platform X.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Education a key focus for lawmakers, DeSantis in 2025 state budget
item.description: Governor Ron DeSantis is urging lawmakers to consider his state budget proposal one month before they are back in Tallahassee to begin the 2025 legislative session.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What Simon says in House goes, but temporary chamber leader tiptoes through intensely partisan terrain
item.description: Secretary of State Steve Simon is in the center of a fight over power in the Minnesota House of Representatives. The executive branch officeholder who was first elected to public office two decades ago says he’s not taking sides. Republicans have sued Simon and vice versa.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Trump kept his tariffs pledge. Is he ready for the fallout? Are Americans? What to know
item.description: The Budget Lab at Yale University estimates Trump’s tariffs would cost the average American household $1,000 to $1,200 in annual purchasing power.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ken Martin elected next DNC chair
item.description: Minnesota state party chair Ken Martin was elected on Saturday as the next leader of the Democratic National Committee (DNC) after securing a majority of the 448 DNC committee members’ votes.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, WFLA, NBC
